metadata.title: Sui Ecosystem Repository Catalog
metadata.description: Comprehensive catalog of 130+ Sui/Move ecosystem repositories for brokenigloo developer tool

repos.name: sui-dapp-starter
repos.description: Full-stack Sui dApp starter with pnpm create sui-dapp@latest. React + Move scaffold with built-in wallet integration.

repos.name: create-dapp
repos.description: Official Mysten Labs scaffolding tool to set up a basic React dApp using Sui dApp Kit.

repos.name: sui-dapp-scaffold-v1
repos.description: Frontend scaffold by Bucket Protocol using Next.js, shadcn/ui, and @mysten/dapp-kit.

repos.name: bezata-sui-dapp-starter
repos.description: SUI dApp starter template built with Next.js.

repos.name: sui-dapp-kit-theme-creator
repos.description: Visual tool that turns color palettes into Sui dApp Kit themes.

repos.name: Capybara-Fusion
repos.description: Official MystenLabs starter template for Sui games.

repos.name: sui-voting-app
repos.description: Hands-on Sui dApp development with Move and React. Voting system tutorial app.

repos.name: wormhole-scaffolding
repos.description: Starter apps with Wormhole cross-chain integration, includes Sui support.

repos.name: suivelte-dapp-kit
repos.description: Sui dApp Kit port for Svelte framework.

repos.name: deepbookv3
repos.description: DeepBook V3: Next-gen decentralized central limit order book (CLOB) on Sui with flashloans and governance.

repos.name: sui-lending-protocol
repos.description: Scallop: Over-collateralized lending protocol on SUI network. Move smart contracts.

repos.name: suilend
repos.description: Suilend: Money market on Sui blockchain with deposit, borrow, repay, and liquidation.

repos.name: cetus-clmm-sui-sdk
repos.description: Official Cetus CLMM SDK for concentrated liquidity DEX integration on Sui.

repos.name: cetus-aggregator
repos.description: Cetus Aggregator integrating Cetus, DeepBook, Kriya, FlowX, Aftermath, and more for best swap routing.

repos.name: turbos-clmm-sdk
repos.description: Turbos Finance concentrated liquidity market maker SDK for Sui DEX.

repos.name: turbos-sui-move-interface
repos.description: Turbos Sui Move smart contract interface definitions.

repos.name: flowx-ts-sdk
repos.description: FlowX Finance TypeScript SDK supporting multiple DEXs: FlowX, FlowX CLMM, Kriya, Turbos, Cetus, Aftermath, DeepBook.

repos.name: flowx-clmm-contracts
repos.description: FlowX CLMM protocol Move contracts inspired by Uniswap v3 on Sui.

repos.name: interest-protocol-sui-defi
repos.description: Interest Protocol experimental contracts including Concentrated Liquidity AMM (UniswapV3 in Move).

repos.name: bucket-protocol-sdk
repos.description: Bucket Protocol TypeScript SDK for $BUCK stablecoin, 0% interest lending, and CDP operations on Sui.

repos.name: aftermath-ts-sdk
repos.description: Aftermath Finance TypeScript SDK for DEX, router, and liquid staking on Sui.

repos.name: aftermath-sdk-rust
repos.description: Aftermath Finance Rust SDK for Sui integration.

repos.name: navi-sdk
repos.description: NAVI Protocol SDK for deposits, borrows, repays, liquidations, flash loans, and oracle queries on Sui.

repos.name: navi-aggregator-sdk
repos.description: NAVI Aggregator for Sui DeFi ecosystem, supporting Cetus, Turbos, DeepBook v3, Aftermath, Kriya.

repos.name: stablecoin-sui
repos.description: Circle's official USDC smart contracts for Sui blockchain in Move.

repos.name: DEX-Router-Sui-V1
repos.description: OKX DEX aggregation and routing system for optimal token swapping across multiple Sui DEXs.

repos.name: volo-liquid-staking-contracts
repos.description: Volo liquid staking Move contracts for Sui.

repos.name: alphaFi-liquid-staking
repos.description: stSUI open-source Liquid Staking Token framework forked from SpringSui with enhanced rewards and security.

repos.name: staking-pool-sui
repos.description: Meta Staking Pool (mpSUI) for Sui Network.

repos.name: sui (core repo)
repos.description: Sui blockchain core: validator, fullnode, Move framework, sui-sdk Rust crate, CLI, and all infrastructure.

repos.name: ts-sdks (monorepo)
repos.description: Official TypeScript SDK monorepo with 28+ packages: @mysten/sui, dapp-kit, bcs, kiosk, deepbook-v3, walrus, seal, enoki, signers, and more.

repos.name: @mysten/sui
repos.description: Core Sui TypeScript SDK: client, transaction building, signing, BCS, keypairs, zkLogin.

repos.name: @mysten/dapp-kit
repos.description: Official React components, hooks, and utilities for Sui dApp development with wallet connection.

repos.name: @mysten/bcs
repos.description: Binary Canonical Serialization (BCS) library for TypeScript.

repos.name: @mysten/kiosk
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for Sui Kiosk standard: NFT trading, transfer policies, extensions.

repos.name: @mysten/deepbook-v3
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for DeepBook V3 CLOB interactions.

repos.name: @mysten/walrus
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for Walrus decentralized storage.

repos.name: @mysten/seal
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for Seal decentralized secrets management and encryption.

repos.name: @mysten/enoki
repos.description: Enoki SDK for simplified onboarding, sponsored transactions, and zkLogin.

repos.name: @mysten/suins
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for SuiNS name service resolution.

repos.description: AWS KMS, GCP KMS, and other external signer implementations for Sui.

repos.name: @mysten/payment-kit

repos.name: polymedia-suitcase
